message.content:
In the directory C:/Users/User/citedby-ai, find all console.log/console.warn lines in pages/EeatBuilder.tsx and pages/SMCStudio.tsx. Run:
```
cd "C:/Users/User/citedby-ai" && grep -n "console\.\(log\|warn\|error\)" pages/EeatBuilder.tsx pages/SMCStudio.tsx 2>/dev/null
```
Return the exact output.

input.description: Find all console.log/warn/error lines in EeatBuilder.tsx and SMCStudio.tsx
